warnings: Issue #3 is the active follow-up loop and remains blocked until grower-approved good-production periods are available for configs/rtr_good_windows.yaml.

The synced issue #3 branch now includes the merged KAMIS live produce panel, the 14-day actual + 3y/5y/10y seasonal trend overlay, the issue #10 fallback/labeling hardening, the issue #12 dashboard layout rebalance, and the issue #14 Korean dashboard localization from main.
The KAMIS live produce price panel uses the official docs sample credentials (`test/test`) unless repo-root .env overrides them with issued `KAMIS_API_KEY` and `KAMIS_API_ID` values.
